Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
its going to take some doing @rhatdan but thats the idea
LGTM and I'm keeping all the fingers and toes crossed for happy tests.

@baude in case you missed it on IRC:

* Matt said the cgroups tests are bugged (they should report an error, but instead silently ignore).  So skip for now, w/ comment and/or open issue.
* The `nsenter` tests should work, Matt suspects a real bug, I suspect a test-bug :smile: 
* The networking tests are going to be hit/miss, we'll have to knock 'em down as they come.
:boom: Invalid `.papr.yml`: failed to parse 1st testsuite: at least one of 'host', 'container', or 'cluster' required.

@baude FYI- I force-pushed to #2694 with a few small updates.  With that PR and this one, you should now be able to: ``hack/get_ci_vm.sh -r fedora-29-libpod-6318419153518592`` and it'll plop you right into the rootless user (after running the setup).

@giuseppe is running with this in https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/2704 ... closing this out and will merge his with the rootless fixes.
